JOIN US IN HARRISONBURG, VA Wednesday!
| Dear Peter,

Remember to get your tickets to join Gov. Mike Pence and team in **Harrisonburg****, VA, Wednesday, Oct. 5th @ 11:30 AM** for a rally! [Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fharrisonburg-va%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_hrsnbg_105e&n=2 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/harrisonburg-va/"). Details about the event are below:

**Wednesday, October 5th: Harrisonburg, VA**
**** Rockingham County Fair Association
Exhibit Hall
4808 South Valley Pike
Harrisonburg, VA 22801
Doors Open: 9:30 AM
Event Begins: 11:30 AM
[Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fharrisonburg-va%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_hrsnbg_105e&n=3 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/harrisonburg-va/").
__ Please limit personal items and arrive early to expedite entrance into the venue - please note, **NO homemade signs, banners, professional cameras with a detachable lens, tripods, monopods, selfie sticks, back packs or large bags will be permitted into the venue.**

We hope to see you there! Sincerely,

Team Trump

* * *

TEXT **TRUMP** TO **88022** TO GET EXCLUSIVE UPDATES ***By participating, you consent to receiving automated text messages from the campaign. Standard messaging rates apply.***

To donate, go here: [https://secure.donaldjtrump.com/donate/](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.donaldjtrump.com%2Fdonate%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_hrsnbg_105e&n=4 "https://secure.donaldjtrump.com/donate/")

* * *

The issues facing our nation are complex. They're not binary. It requires us to think well, and that's why My Faith Votes is encouraging every Christian to Pray. Think. and Vote.

It is also why we are proudly sponsoring Q Commons on October 13. This two-hour live event will educate Christians on how they can bring hope and leadership to their communities in a critical moment for America. Join us and other thought leaders, in your city, as we tackle the difficult issues in our nation.

Q Commons | Engaging Our Divided Nation | Lecrae, Ravi Zacharias + More

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Team, I want to say thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5496148706707111936/6389788735076040704?refcode=e20161001a&refcode2=e20161001nd&amount=25)
---
Hi Friends --

Last night was the final FEC quarterly deadline of this campaign -- and you knocked it out of the park. Thousands of grassroots supporters pitched in, and with just hours left, we hit our $75,000 goal.

**I can 't thank you enough.**

The reality of this race is stark: we're up against BIG money -- from Wall Street, special interests, and countless right-wing Super PACs. Mitch McConnell himself has channeled millions into beating us.

But you know what? I'm not intimidated, and neither is my team, and that's because we have _you_ on our side. Our success last night wasn't because of million dollar checks -- instead, I'm proud to say that it was the result of small, grassroots donations. Our average online contribution was just $31.

But, look, there's another reality of this race, too -- and it's that no matter how immensely inspired we are about last night's result, we simply can't afford to sit back now until Election Day. This is October, the final full month of our race, and we're separated from Pat Toomey in the polls by a __fraction of a point__.

If we're truly in it to win it, then we have to look forward now to what's next. We have field teams to equip, messages to get on the airwaves, and voters to turn out. We have SO much to do, and it starts now. And just like last night, we're looking to the grassroots to get it done.

[**There are 38 days left to fight. Please, pitch in now to make each one count >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5496148706707111936/6389788735076040704?refcode=e20161001a&refcode2=e20161001nd&amount=25)

**[Donate now->](https://act.myngp.com/el/5496148706707111936/6389788735076040704?refcode=e20161001a&refcode2=e20161001nd&amount=25)**
In it to win --

Katie McGinty
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

Katie McGinty for Senate

Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Team Katie
subject: don’t be hoodwinked!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:

---
Look --

Pat Toomey thinks economics is in his "wheelhouse" -- and maybe it is, if you believe in shipping American jobs overseas.

But don't be hoodwinked. He's got more than enough experience driving Pennsylvania back to the dark ages. Never forget:

* He said he'd like to actually _jail_ doctors who provide women their abortion services

* He voted for a constitutional amendment to _ban_ same-sex marriage

* He tried to _shut down_ the government to defund Planned Parenthood

In 38 days we have a chance to reject Toomey's dangerously out-of-touch agenda (not to mention his Wall Street allies) -- but look, this race is neck-and-neck. If we don't each do our part, he could have another SIX YEARS to dismantle our rights.

We can't back down, we can't stand on the sidelines. We need to send Katie to the Senate to fight for the things that matter to us, and to protect the rights of ALL Americans -- but we can only do it together.

[**Let 's show Toomey we deserve better. Pitch in now to help Katie win this race >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7988189328570318848/7831222090811310080?refcode=e20161001.2&refcode2=e20161001.2nd&amount=25)

body:
Thanks to you, we hit our fundraising target -- again!

Dear Friend,

We set an ambitious fundraising target for September -- and you came through big time. Thank you!

I am honored and grateful for your support. It could not come at a more important moment as we head into the last six weeks of this election cycle.

And, in about three weeks, ballots start dropping across Washington, and voters will begin making their choice for governor.

Your contribution helps share our message, strengthen our winning ground game, increase personal voter contacts, and expand our Get Out the Vote efforts during this critical time. We also have crucial resources to fight back against the barrage of attacks we're expecting from my opponent in the next few weeks.

Thank you for standing with me. Your confidence means the world to me and Trudi.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

P.S. It's not too late to step up. I’m counting on your support -- so, I hope you can make a donation.

subject: [NEW VIDEO] A story Trump doesn't want to hear >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0815/24c69fd9/141a5522/18ebd1fe/3263540434/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPENEV02N_digital_email_20161001_WCSTvid3_n-all&source=WPENEV02N_digital_email_20161001_WCSTvid3_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Diane Guerrero is an actor you may have seen in shows like "Jane the Virgin" and "Orange is the New Black." She's also the daughter of immigrants who were deported while trying to become American citizens when she was just 14.

Diane's story is similar to that of countless young Latinas. It's a story we don't hear often enough, and a story Donald Trump doesn't care to hear.

**That's why we launched a new Women Can Stop Trump video of Diane sharing her story. Check it out -- then make sure your friends see it too.** [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0815/24c69fd9/141a5522/18ebd1ff/3263540434/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/videos/10154462410652435/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=WPENEV02N_digital_email_20161001_WCSTvid3_n-all&source=WPENEV02N_digital_email_20161001_WCSTvid3_n-all") Donald Trump has repeatedly insulted the Latino community, saying Latinos are "rapists" and "murderers" and bragging that he's going to build a "great, great" wall and make Mexico pay for it.

But here's the thing: Latinas are the fastest growing voting bloc among women, and they have the power to make a real difference in November.

If Latinas and other women are going to stop Trump, we need to make sure everyone knows just how bad a Trump presidency would be.

**Watch and share our newest Women Can Stop Trump video today:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Watch-Dianes-Video](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0815/24c69fd9/141a5522/18ebd1f8/3263540434/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/videos/10154462410652435/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWatchDianesVideo&utm_campaign=WPENEV02N_digital_email_20161001_WCSTvid3_n-all&source=WPENEV02N_digital_email_20161001_WCSTvid3_n-all")**

Thanks,

Caitlin Mitchell

"" Donald Trump has repeatedly insulted the Latino community, saying Latinos are "rapists" and "murderers" and bragging that he's going to build a "great, great" wall and make Mexico pay for it. But here's the thing: Latinas are the fastest growing voting bloc among women, and they have the power to make a real difference in November. If Latinas and other women are going to stop Trump, we need to make sure everyone knows just how bad a Trump presidency would be. Watch and share our newest Women Can Stop Trump video today: "" Thanks, Caitlin Mitchell Vice President of Digital, EMILY's List "" | ---|---|--- EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. name: Team Bullock
subject: Are you proud of Montana?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock
body:
Friend,

You wouldn't know this by listening to Greg Gianforte's non-stop commercials and constant attacks -- but Montana is great.

Montana now leads the country in household income growth rates, our GDP is growing at the fifth fastest rate, we have the sixth best business tax climate and we are number one for new business startups. And that doesn't capture our unparalleled natural beauty and quality of life.

Of course, there is always still more work to be done, and that's why Steve is running so hard for a second term. But despite all the noise this election season, we hope you'll take a moment to let Steve know that you're with him with less than 38 days to go.
